blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,904 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 72".
